name: task_execution_planner
description: Decide how to execute a generic task
template:
Task: {task}
Description: {description}

Determine how to execute this task. Should the agent:
1. Create a new tool
2. Optimize existing code
3. Analyze more deeply
4. Modify configuration

Respond with exactly:
ACTION: [one of: create_tool, optimize, analyze, modify_config]
system_prompt: You are a task execution planner.
